---
title: "Data Visualization"
format: html
---

## Load packages
```{r}
#| label: load packages for data wrangling
library(readr)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(janitor)
#data viz
library(ggplot2)
#and interactive out
library(plotly)
```

## Load data
```{r}
:| #read using direct link
delta_visits_raw <- read_csv("https://tinyurl.com/delta-activities")
```

## Explore data
```{r}
#| label: look at data
#Get column names
colnames(delta_visits_raw)

#peek at each column and class
glimpse(delta_visits_raw)

#from when to when
range(delta_visits_raw$Date)

#which time of day?
unique(delta_visits_raw$Time_of_Day)
colnames(delta_visits_raw)
```

## Clean up the data
```{r}
delta_visits <- delta_visits_raw %>%
    janitor::clean_names()
colnames(delta_visits)[1:6]
```

## Reshape to tidy (long) format
```{r}
visits_long <- delta_visits %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(sm_boat, med_boat, lrg_boat, bank_angler, scientist, cars),
    names_to = "visitor_type",
    values_to = "quantity"
  ) %>%
  ### shorten the long name:
  dplyr::rename(restore_loc = eco_restore_approximate_location) %>%
  ### drop the notes column:
  dplyr::select(-notes)

glimpse(visits_long)
```

## Calculate daily visits
```{r}
daily_visits_loc <- visits_long %>%
    dplyr::group_by(restore_loc, date, visitor_type) %>% 
    dplyr::summarize(daily_visits = sum(quantity), .groups = 'drop')#.groups less likely to conflict with column name in df
    
glimpse(daily_visits_loc)
```

## Data viz
```{r}
ggplot(data = daily_visits_loc,
       mapping = aes(x = restore_loc, y = daily_visits)) +
  geom_col() + 
  labs(title = 'Plot title')
```

## Make plot with axes switched
```{r}
ggplot() +
    geom_col(data = daily_visits_loc,
             aes(y = restore_loc, x = daily_visits))
```

## Setting a fixed color
```{r}
ggplot(data = daily_visits_loc,
       aes(x = restore_loc, y = daily_visits)) +
  geom_col(color = 'red',
           fill = "steelblue")
```

## Use variable type for fill
```{r}
ggplot(data = daily_visits_loc,
       aes(x = restore_loc, y = daily_visits)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = visitor_type),
           color = 'red')
```


```{r}
daily_visits_loc %>% 
    ggplot(aes(y = restore_loc, x = daily_visits, fill = visitor_type)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(x = "Number of Visits",
       y = "Restoration Location",
       fill = "Visitor Type",
       title = "Total Visits to Delta Restoration Areas by Visitor Type",
       subtitle = "Sum of all visits July 2017 - March 2018") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 120, 20), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )
```
